Script.name: djangomoo_bootstrap
Script.script:
-- Bootstrap: load all djangomoo Lua modules from the package directory. -- Runs once when Mudlet loads the package; everything afterward goes -- through the djangomoo.* tables defined here.
local pkgDir = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/djangomoo"
dofile(pkgDir .. "/lua/bridge_config.lua") dofile(pkgDir .. "/lua/binary.lua") dofile(pkgDir .. "/lua/mapper.lua") dofile(pkgDir .. "/lua/setup.lua") dofile(pkgDir .. "/lua/editor.lua") dofile(pkgDir .. "/lua/connection.lua")
-- Read the pinned sshelnet version out of config.lua without polluting globals. local cfgEnv = {} local f = loadfile(pkgDir .. "/config.lua") if f then setfenv(f, cfgEnv) pcall(f) if cfgEnv.sshelnet_pinned_version and cfgEnv.sshelnet_pinned_version ~= "" then djangomoo.binary.setPinnedVersion(cfgEnv.sshelnet_pinned_version) end end

Script.name: djangomoo_on_load
Script.script: function djangomoo_on_load() if djangomoo and djangomoo.binary then djangomoo.binary.checkForUpdate() end end

Script.name: djangomoo_on_protocol_enabled
Script.script: function djangomoo_on_protocol_enabled(event, protocol) if event ~= "sysProtocolEnabled" then return end if protocol ~= "GMCP" then return end if djangomoo and djangomoo.editor then djangomoo.editor.advertiseCapability("sysProtocolEnabled GMCP") end end

Script.name: djangomoo_on_connection
Script.script: function djangomoo_on_connection(event) if event ~= "sysConnectionEvent" then return end -- Fallback: if sysProtocolEnabled didn't fire (or fired before our -- handler was registered), wait long enough for IAC negotiation to -- finish and try again. advertiseCapability is idempotent. tempTimer(1.5, function() if djangomoo and djangomoo.editor then djangomoo.editor.advertiseCapability("sysConnectionEvent +1.5s fallback") end end) end

Script.name: djangomoo_editor_start
Script.script: function djangomoo_editor_start(event) if event ~= "gmcp.Editor.Start" then return end if djangomoo and djangomoo.editor then djangomoo.editor.onEditorStart() end end

Script.name: djangomoo_mapper
Script.script: function djangomoo_mapper(event) if event ~= "gmcp.Room.Info" then return end if djangomoo and djangomoo.mapper then djangomoo.mapper.handle_room_info() end end

Script.name: djangomoo_on_disconnect
Script.script: function djangomoo_on_disconnect() if djangomoo and djangomoo.connection then djangomoo.connection.onDisconnect() end end

Script.name: djangomoo_on_exit
Script.script: function djangomoo_on_exit() if djangomoo and djangomoo.connection then djangomoo.connection.onExit() end end

Alias.name: dmsetup
Alias.script: if djangomoo and djangomoo.setup then djangomoo.setup.dispatch(matches[2], matches[3]) end

Alias.name: dmconnect
Alias.script: if djangomoo and djangomoo.connection then djangomoo.connection.dmconnect() end

Alias.name: dmkill
Alias.script: if djangomoo and djangomoo.connection then djangomoo.connection.dmkill() end

Alias.name: dmupgrade
Alias.script: if djangomoo and djangomoo.connection then djangomoo.connection.dmupgrade() end

Alias.name: djangomoo_password_capture
Alias.script: if djangomoo and djangomoo.connection then djangomoo.connection.onPasswordCapture(matches[2]) end

Alias.name: dmpassword
Alias.script: if djangomoo and djangomoo.connection then djangomoo.connection.dmpassword(matches[2]) end

Alias.name: dmstatus
Alias.script: if djangomoo and djangomoo.connection then djangomoo.connection.dmstatus() end
